components.StructureSigSim: Jaccard over categorical shape features + Hamming over control presence + MSE penalty over counts; bonus if both sides are array_by_dimension with same dimension set.
components.TypeMatch: Exact match on value_type + units; partial credit for numeric compat.
components.DimensionMatch: 1.0 when contribution_type sets equal; 0.5 for subset; 0 for disjoint.
components.ConstraintCompat: 1.0 when source constraints within target bounds; 0.5 overlap; else 0.
components.DomainHintSim: 1.0 if domain from section_context aligns; 0.5 if adjacent (eligibility↔vesting service).
